name.value: Save 30¢ per gallon on your first fill-up

value.value: Save 30¢ per gallon on your first fill-up

name.value: 1. Save 30¢ per gallon when you download the ValeroPay+ app, enable mobile payment, and make your first Fuel Purchase using the ValeroPay+ app between 03/31/2022 through 06/30/2022. This offer does not apply to non-fuel purchases. A Fuel Purchase for the purpose of this offer is defined as a purchase of fuel from any participating Valero, Diamond Shamrock, Beacon, or Shamrock branded retail location (each, a Branded Location) in the US using an electronic form of payment through the ValeroPay+ app on your mobile device. This offer is limited to the maximum amount allowed by dispenser authorization limits. The fuel discount is automatic and will discount the price paid by $0.30 per gallon. Both the original price and discounted price will be shown on the mobile receipt located in the History tab in your ValeroPay+ app. Void where prohibited. We reserve the right to change or terminate the terms of this offer at any time and in any manner, without prior notice.

value.value: 1. Save 30¢ per gallon when you download the ValeroPay+ app, enable mobile payment, and make your first Fuel Purchase using the ValeroPay+ app between 03/31/2022 through 06/30/2022. name.value: 2. Save 10¢ per gallon on all Fuel Purchases through 12/31/2022 using your Valero Consumer Credit Card in the ValeroPay+ app. This offer does not apply to non-Fuel Purchases. A Fuel Purchase for the purpose of this offer is defined as a purchase of fuel from any participating Valero, Diamond Shamrock, Beacon, or Shamrock branded retail location (each, a Branded Location) in the US using your Valero Consumer Credit Card through the ValeroPay+ app on your mobile device. This offer is limited to the maximum amount allowed by dispenser authorization limits. The fuel discount is automatic and will discount the price paid by $0.10 per gallon. Both the original price and discounted price will be shown on the mobile receipt located in the History tab in your ValeroPay+ app. Void where prohibited. We reserve the right to change or terminate the terms of this offer at any time and in any manner, without prior notice.

A Fuel Purchase for the purpose of this offer is defined as a purchase of fuel from any participating Valero, Diamond Shamrock, Beacon, or Shamrock branded retail location (each, a Branded Location) in the US using Valero ValuePay through the ValeroPay+ app on your mobile device. This offer is limited to the maximum amount allowed by dispenser authorization limits. The fuel discount is automatic and will discount the price paid by $0.10 per gallon. Both the original price and discounted price will be shown on the mobile receipt located in the History tab in your ValeroPay+ app. Void where prohibited. We reserve the right to change or terminate the terms of this offer at any time and in any manner, without prior notice.

name.value: : As a result of severe supply chain constraints in the gasoline detergent additive industry, at many product terminals throughout the United States, Valero may be unable to deliver gasoline that contains detergent additive at a dosage higher than that required by EPA regulations. Until further notice, gasoline supplied by Valero to retail motor fuel stations bearing one of the Valero brands may not contain enough additive to meet the TOP TIER™ standards. For more information about this industry-wide additive shortage, please visit

value.value: : As a result of severe supply chain constraints in the gasoline detergent additive industry, at many product terminals throughout the United States, Valero may be unable to deliver gasoline that contains detergent additive at a dosage higher than that required by EPA regulations. Until further notice, gasoline supplied by Valero to retail motor fuel stations bearing one of the Valero brands may not contain enough additive to meet the TOP TIER™ standards. For more information about this industry-wide additive shortage, please visit
